records.question: Which performances had an attendance of at most 1982?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
WHERE performance.attendance <= 1982
records.pred_sql: SELECT Performance_ID FROM performance WHERE Attendance <= 1982

records.question: Which performances held at Verizon Center on February 7, hosted by the Pittsburgh Penguins, had an attendance of at least 1877?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
WHERE performance.attendance >= 1877 AND performance.location = 'Verizon Center' AND performance.host = 'Pittsburgh Penguins' AND performance.date = 'February 7'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Performance_ID
FROM performance
WHERE Location = 'Verizon Center'
  AND Date = 'February 7'
  AND Host = 'Pittsburgh Penguins'
  AND Attendance >= 1877

records.question: What performances on February 2 have an attendance of exactly 165?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
JOIN member_attendance ON performance.performance_id = member_attendance.performance_id
WHERE performance.attendance = 165 AND performance.date = 'February 2'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Performance_ID FROM performance WHERE Date = 'February 2' AND Attendance = 165

records.question: What performances took place at Bell Centre on February 10 where the host was Montreal Canadiens and attendance was exactly 2173?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
WHERE performance.date = 'February 10' AND performance.attendance = 2173 AND performance.location = 'Bell Centre' AND performance.host = 'Montreal Canadiens'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Performance_ID FROM performance WHERE Location = 'Bell Centre' AND Date = 'February 10' AND Host = 'Montreal Canadiens' AND Attendance = 2173

records.question: Which performances took place at Scotiabank Place on February 11?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
WHERE performance.date = 'February 11' AND performance.location = 'Scotiabank Place'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Performance_ID FROM performance WHERE Location = 'Scotiabank Place' AND Date = 'February 11'

records.question: Which performances took place on February 10 where the host is Montreal Canadiens?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
WHERE performance.date = 'February 10' AND performance.host = 'Montreal Canadiens'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Performance_ID FROM performance WHERE Date = 'February 10' AND Host = 'Montreal Canadiens'

records.question: Which performances took place at TD Garden on February 2 that had member attendance?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
JOIN member_attendance ON performance.performance_id = member_attendance.performance_id
WHERE performance.location = 'TD Garden' AND performance.date = 'February 2'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT performance.Performance_ID
FROM performance
JOIN member_attendance ON performance.Performance_ID = member_attendance.Performance_ID
WHERE performance.Location = 'TD Garden' AND performance.Date = 'February 2'

records.question: Which performances on February 5 had exactly 1878 attendees and included members playing at least 2 pieces each?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
JOIN member_attendance ON performance.performance_id = member_attendance.performance_id
WHERE performance.attendance = 1878 AND performance.date = 'February 5' AND member_attendance.num_of_pieces >= 2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.Performance_ID
FROM performance p
JOIN member_attendance ma ON p.Performance_ID = ma.Performance_ID
WHERE p.Date = 'February 5'
  AND p.Attendance = 1878
GROUP BY p.Performance_ID
HAVING MIN(ma.Num_of_Pieces) >= 2

records.question: Which performances hosted by Boston Bruins at TD Garden on February 2 had at least 165 attendees and member attendance with at least one piece played?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
JOIN member_attendance ON performance.performance_id = member_attendance.performance_id
WHERE performance.location = 'TD Garden' AND performance.host = 'Boston Bruins' AND member_attendance.num_of_pieces >= 1 AND performance.date = 'February 2' AND performance.attendance >= 165
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.Performance_ID
FROM performance p
JOIN member_attendance ma ON p.Performance_ID = ma.Performance_ID
WHERE p.Host = 'Boston Bruins'
  AND p.Location = 'TD Garden'
  AND p.Date = 'February 2'
  AND p.Attendance >= 165
  AND ma.Num_of_Pieces > 0
GROUP BY p.Performance_ID

records.question: Which performances held at TD Garden on February 2 were hosted by the Boston Bruins with an attendance exactly 165?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
WHERE performance.date = 'February 2' AND performance.location = 'TD Garden' AND performance.host = 'Boston Bruins' AND performance.attendance = 165
records.pred_sql: SELECT Performance_ID FROM performance WHERE Location = 'TD Garden' AND Date = 'February 2' AND Host = 'Boston Bruins' AND Attendance = 165
